large_artifacts_policy: Large raw models/predictions remain under ignored results_20260614_stress/raw and are not committed.

production_model.selection: lowest external_10714 MAE among full_reference xgboost seed artifacts
production_model.api_contract: complete-input WQI5 surrogate; required features are DO, BOD, NH3N, EC, SS
production_model.not_for: missing-indicator replacement or future water-quality forecasting
